# Predaja zadataka

Na ovoj stranici predajete zadatke.


<div style="max-width: 500px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px;">
  
  <input type="text" id="ime" placeholder="Ime" />
  <input type="text" id="prezime" placeholder="Prezime" />

  <input type="file" id="file" />

  <button onclick="upload()">Pošalji</button>

</div>
